summary: Iteration 29 — Madino partner + MongoDB-backed partner CRUD + admin UI tested end-to-end. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass. Frontend: admin grid, create/edit/delete, preview modal, chalet terras flow with Madino all work.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with {error: 'Partner niet gevonden'} when missing. Standard REST expects 404. Same for admin update/delete and duplicate POST. Currently consumers must inspect body for 'error'.

issues: React hydration warning: <button data-testid=model-supplier-{id}> nested inside parent <button data-testid=model-{id}> at ChaletWizard.jsx:287/299. Browser logs runtime hydration error. Replace inner button with a <span role=button> + onClick + stopPropagation, or hoist supplier link outside the parent button.

action_items: Fix nested <button> hydration error in ChaletWizard.jsx (model supplier chip inside model selection button).
Consider returning 404 + non-2xx codes from partner endpoints for not-found / duplicate cases (currently always 200 with error body).
critical_code_review_comments: partner_profiles.py mixes seed data and MongoDB code in one 700+ line file — split PARTNER_PROFILES seed dict to a separate seed_partners.py module.
ChaletWizard.jsx has nested <button> producing hydration warning; affects accessibility (a11y) and React state.
Public GET /api/partners/profiles/{id} for unknown id returns 200 with {error: ...} — inconsistent with HTTP semantics and confuses frontend error handling.
_ensure_seeded uses module-global _seeded flag — fine for single worker but will re-seed once per worker on multi-worker uvicorn; idempotency guard inside is OK so this is safe but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: Test created and deleted 'Test Demo' partner via UI; deleted both test-demo + test-partner-x via API after test run. Final partner count back to 7.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 partner_profiles (ticra-outdoor, kunert-group, arcabo, campsolutions, bbs-systeembouw, eijsink, madino) verified in MongoDB seed. Chalet terras now uses Madino (6 options incl 'terras-geen'). FlowSelector has 8 tiles incl flow-admin-partners. SupplierProfile modal opens correctly from PartnerProfileAdmin grid AND from chalet supplier-tag-terras / supplier-tag-wellness chips. Note: backend returns 200+error-body for not-found; tests assert that pattern.
verified_flows: FlowSelector contains flow-admin-partners tile (8 tiles total)
Preview madino opens supplier-profile-modal (NOT full page)
Delete Test Demo with confirm dialog → cards back to 7
Chalet flow → samenstellen tab → upgrade-terras has 6 options [terras-geen, terras-madino-bistro, terras-madino-lounge, terras-madino-dining, terras-madino-loungebed, terras-madino-firepit]
supplier-tag-terras chip text='Madino', click opens modal containing 'Madino' + 'Leisure Talk #23' + 'Firepit'
supplier-tag-wellness chip text='Ticra Outdoor', click opens supplier-profile-modal
